_note_first_bracket: 14.5% is the effective 2025 rate: 15% Jan-Jun, 14% Jul-Dec, blended annually per CRA T4127 Jan 2026
_note_fourth_bracket: Statutory rate 29%. Effective marginal rate ~29.31% due to BPA phase-out across $177,882-$253,414. BPA is modelled separately as a phasing credit.
_note_bpa: BPA phases from $16,129 down to $14,538 for income $177,882-$253,414. This app uses the full $16,129 (conservative, ignores phase-out). Update if high-income accuracy is required.
_note_oas: maxAnnual = maxMonthlyAge65to74 * 12 rounded. Clawback threshold $93,454 is 2025 tax-year threshold. Q4 2025 (Oct-Dec) rates used as representative annual amounts.
_note_gis: GIS is income-tested; first $5K of employment income is exempt from clawback. This app uses simplified clawback on all non-OAS income.

capitalGains._note: Flat 50% inclusion for 2025. The Budget 2024 proposal of tiered 50%/$250K/66.67% was formally cancelled March 21, 2025. No threshold applies.

_note_rrif: CRA prescribed factors for qualifying (post-1992) RRIFs. Age 95+ uses 20% flat rate. Unchanged from 2015.
